description: Post-release smoke checks for package surface and core runtime scripts.

checks.title: Package entrypoint resolves
checks.expectedBehavior: The published root entrypoint resolves without module-not-found errors.

checks.title: CLI help renders
checks.expectedBehavior: CLI prints usage information and exits successfully.

checks.title: Validator vector runner passes
checks.expectedBehavior: Validator fixture vectors complete with pass=true.
checks.failureReason: Runner still treats async validateUI() as a synchronous value.

checks.title: Fix-loop vector runner passes
checks.expectedBehavior: Fix-loop fixture vectors complete with pass=true.
checks.failureReason: Runner still treats async runFixLoop() as a synchronous value.

checks.title: End-to-end pipeline script runs
checks.expectedBehavior: Pipeline run writes all expected output artifacts.
checks.failureReason: Script exits 0, but async validator/fix-loop results can serialize to empty objects.

checks.title: Pipeline outputs match expected snapshots
checks.expectedBehavior: Generated pipeline artifacts match committed expected snapshots.
checks.failureReason: Pipeline artifacts for validation/fix-loop are currently corrupted by unresolved async values.
